title: Better Carrot Items
description: With this resource pack, your tools will become carrots! Try this resource pack.
body:
With this resource pack, your tools will become carrots! Try this resource pack and be cool among your friends!

**Texture changes include: All swords, all axes, all shovels, all hoes, all picks, trident, flint and steel, fishing rod, fire charge.**
# **1.16.5 - 1.21.4**
